entries.response:
Here is a sample plant UML diagram to get you started:
```
+---------------+
|  Plant UML Code  |
+---------------+
*  Parent node (label)      |
*  Child nodes (labels)     |
*  Parent node        |
*  Child node        |
*  Parent node                |
*  Parent node            |
+---------------+
```
This diagram shows a tree-like structure with child nodes that inherit from parent nodes. Each child node has two children: the parent and child nodes, separated by an `@` symbol. The root node (label) is used to define the entire diagram.

Here is a sample plant UML diagram:
```
+---------------+
|  Plant UML Code  |
+-...
                    
    +---------------+
        Parent node (label)      |
        Child nodes (labels)     |
        Parent node        |
        Child node        |
         Parent node                |
+---------------+
|  Parent node (label)      |
+---------------+
        Error: Missing @startuml or @enduml tags
            
    +---------------+
        Child nodes (labels)        |
        Child nodes (labels)         |
        Child node        |
        Child node        |
         Child node                |
     Parent node                |
+---------------+
|  Parent node                |
+---------------+
        Error: Missing @enduml or @startuml tags
            
    +---------------+
            Error: Missing @startuml or @enduml tags
            
    +---------------+
        Error: Missing @enduml or @startuml tags
            
    +---------------+
```
